title: Connus Trell
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:Senatortrell.jpg]] |name=Connus Trell |homeworld=[[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' |birth= |death=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] |species=[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |skin=Green |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] *[[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]] {{C|secretly}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I doubt that he'll be missed, the guy was as dirty as they come.|[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]|}} '''Connus Trell''' was a green-skinned [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] and the [[Gaulus sector/Legends|Gaulus sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Along with [[Orn Free Taa/Legends|Orn Free Taa]] and [[Chom Frey Kaa]], Trell was a large presence in the Senate as the representative of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] and head of the [[Senate Investigative Committee]], but was ultimately killed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Release the senator or we will open fire!''"
"''Do what he says bounty hunter.''"
"''Release him now!''"
"''As you wish.|Coruscant Police order Jango Fett to release Senator Trell|}} Connus Trell was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who was appointed co-[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Gaulus sector/Legends|Gaulus sector]], serving alongside [[Orn Free Taa/Legends|Orn Free Taa]] and [[Chom Frey Kaa]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During his tenure, Trell became involved with the [[Komari Vosa]]-led [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]-worshiping cult called the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]]. Helping to traffic [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] on Coruscant alongside drug boss [[Groff Haugg]], Trell was obtaining the narcotics from the [[Malastare/Legends|Malastarian]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Sebolto]]. Unknown to the senator, Senator [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] was aware of Trell's longtime narcotics business and was in fact the alter-ego of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] and, after his [[Supreme Chancellor election, 32 BBY/Legends|election]] to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]], Palpatine ordered his secret [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] [[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]] to find a worthy [[Clone template/Legends|template]] for a secret [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|clone army]]. Creating a challenge to discover which [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] would be selected to be that template, Sidious was prepared to put Trell in the line of fire in order to see his [[Grand Plan/Legends|Sith plot]] come to fruition.[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] Commissioned to achieve the bounty on the Bando Gora's feared leader, the bounty hunter [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] began to track the trafficked narcotics (which had been poisoned with special mind-altering substances to 'brainwash' hapless, already brain-dead recruits to the cult) as a way to discern the cult's location. After infiltrating Groff Haugg's nerf-packing plant for answers, Fett discovered a transmission from Trell, who had apparently gotten cold feet about the business and demanded to be released from it. Fett scaled the politician's apartment tower, defeating any police officers who stood in his way, and infiltrated the senator's penthouse. Trell sounded the alarm before being dragged to the balcony of his home, where Fett threatened to drop him over the edge to his death. As Fett threatened to strangle the Twi'lek, Trell revealed his connection with Sebolto of Malastare just as a [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] [[Variable Altitude Assault Transport/enforcement|VAAT/e]] gunship arrived to end the hostage situation. As CSF ordered Fett to 'release' Trell, the bounty hunter acceded to their wishes, though not in the way they expected, letting go of the senator's neck as he dangled from the balcony. Trell plummeted over a thousand feet to his death, and Fett was forced to fight his way free of the police. Afterwards, Fett stated that Trell wouldn't be missed as he "was as dirty as they come." ==Behind the scenes== Trell's voice was provided by [[Gregg Berger]]. ==Appearances== *[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}} *''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Bounty Hunter'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=Co-[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] with [[Orn Free Taa/Legends|Orn Free Taa]] and [[Chom Frey Kaa]] |years=Unknown—[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] |before=Unknown |after=[[Orn Free Taa/Legends|Orn Free Taa]] }} {{EndBox}} {{Interlang |de=Connus Trell#legends |fr=Connus Trell |hu=Connus Trell |nl=Connus Trell |uk=Коннус Трелл |pl=Connus Trell}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Trell, Connus}} [[Category:Bando Gora]] [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Drug dealers]] [[Category:Galactic Republic senators]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Twi'leks]]
